warnings.message: S10: TRANSFER steps should specify action.techniqueId (place/retrieve/pass/handoff) or include notes describing the movement
S10: TRANSFER steps should specify action.techniqueId (place/retrieve/pass/handoff) or include notes describing the movement
S8: station changes from 'pass' to 'garnish' (via dependsOn) with no explicit TRANSFER step; consider modeling a staged transfer (place/retrieve) if this is a real handoff
S9: HEAT steps usually set sublocation to equipment(equipmentId=...) for clarity (missing sublocation)
